name: The Neverending Summer
short_description: Summer comes again and again, and changes come quietly.
detailed_description:
【Plot Summary】

Summer comes and goes, and changes come quietly.

【Character Introduction】

Wan Jing

A bright and cheerful, approachable top student with outstanding looks.

Unexpectedly casual, but a little impatient.

Her hobbies are singing and badminton. Although they are just hobbies, her abilities are also outstanding.

She is very popular, so she was asked by the class teacher to tutor his deskmate in the new semester, and she seems to have no objection to such a tough "request".

Xu Lianxia

Although she has an impeccable face, she is a loner, so she has no sense of existence in the class.

She lives his life drifting with the crowd, and her only hobbies are watching movies and playing games.

Her grades are not good, so she was entrusted to Wan Jing by the class teacher, hoping to make progress under Wan Jing's tutoring.

It seems that she has known Wan Jing since before the third year of high school.

Jing Xingxi

A lively, loyal girl who has been good friends with Wan Jing since elementary school.

Although she looks a bit irritable, she is surprisingly reliable in some aspects.

Have many hobbies and know a little about all fields.

It seems that she has been dissatisfied with a certain idea of ​​Wan Jing since junior high school.

？？？

???'s elder sister, had a big fight with ??? about something in the second year of high school, and started a cold war since then.

【Game Features】

·Short to medium-length plot, nearly 150,000 words

·Exquisite character portraits and CG

·Single ending, dual heroine perspectives bring immersive experience

This game is completely independently made by myself. If you have any questions, please contact me via email: llx31124945@163.com

You are also welcome to join the game exchange group: 1025844034
